frontier: Does a 44-element 3-AP-free subset of [1, 212] exist? Equivalently: is r_3(212) = 43 or 44? The exact 3-AP verifier is trivially decidable in O(|S|²) time; the hardness is in search (exhaustive SAT/MIP/CP-SAT exhaustion failed on 2 of 20 chunks in Ergezer 2026).
action:
Milestone: verifier_construction; contract=sha256:20191ec98ee3e6994ddb8f50a1ae1eef886fbab446ddb9fc748b0c9e7052c4fb
Built and executed an exact 3-AP-free set verifier (verifier_3ap.py) on four fixed fixtures: (1) fixed-good base-3 no-'2' construction giving 31 elements in [1,211], (2) out-of-domain bad fixture with element 213 > N=212, (3) predicate-violation bad fixture with embedded 3-AP (1,2,3), (4) 44-element set with embedded AP. All fixtures verified against domain and predicate branches.
verified:
Milestone: verifier_construction; contract=sha256:20191ec98ee3e6994ddb8f50a1ae1eef886fbab446ddb9fc748b0c9e7052c4fb
Verifier domain: S ⊆ [1, N], distinct elements in range — confirmed by OB fixture rejection (element 213 outside [1, 212], SHA-256: 36743bd4f3a499e1ae5ce40c78674483a4c993c6a0de9918e07f2ba42c18c62a)
Verifier predicate: no three distinct a < b < c ∈ S with a+c=2b — confirmed by PB fixture rejection (3-AP (1, 2, 3), SHA-256: 5b3b9a03c7426ca127163b66c7592f145d6352ee54f8c58138f5dc96431543cb)
Fixed-good: base-3 no-'2' elements in [1,211], |S|=31, 3-AP-free ✓ (SHA-256: de755fa600dc18641f096642867296df7810658ebd17712e64318fa93364e062)
Verifier script: verifier_3ap.py (SHA-256: 42c1106f21c1ee54bfd096ab1ff141d21dada55e83603518a3b4754dd6490cb4)
Evidence: OEIS A003002 b-file (Cariboni, r_3(211)=43), Ergezer 2026 arXiv:2606.04016 (43-witness + 20 SAT chunks, 2 unresolved T1c)
result: Verifier construction completed and all four fixtures passed: fixed-good accepted, out-of-domain rejected with domain violation, predicate-violation rejected with 3-AP detection, and 44-element embedded-AP rejected. The base-3 digit-free construction yields only 31 elements, well below the known optimum of 43 — confirming that greedy/heuristic constructions are insufficient. The exact value of r_3(212) remains in {43, 44} with no change from prior sessions. No new mathematical evidence was produced; the verifier is now cataloged for use in Next gate search operations.
next_gate: Either: (a) obtain Ergezer 2026's 43-set witness for [1,212] from arXiv:2606.04016 and replay it through this exact verifier to confirm reproducibility; or (b) attempt a bounded search for a 44-element 3-AP-free set in [1,212] using CP-SAT with a seeded solver and documented symmetry-breaking, reporting a no-hit only as scoped to the implementation and trials run.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training. Only local research-session artifacts created.
